_README: Proposed additions to /home/ubuntu/projects/github.com/CHITTYOS/ch1tty/servers.json — 13 entries to close the claude.ai-personal-connector gap. Merge into the `servers` array. Endpoints marked TODO need verification against upstream docs before deploy. 1Password vault assumed `ChittyOS-Integrations` (consistent with existing Notion/Stripe entries).

additions.name: Ahrefs
additions._endpoint_TODO: verify Ahrefs MCP endpoint — claude.ai proxies it; direct URL may differ
additions._slim_mcp_note: Ahrefs exposes 126 tools — register behind slim-MCP search/execute via orchestrator, do not surface all tools directly

tenants._doc: Each ChittyOS legal-entity = one Mercury tenant. Proxy selects 1Password credential per tenant_id at call time. No default. tenant_id MUST be a Legal Person ChittyID.
tenants._add_more: one entry per Mercury org. Legalink-space tenants stay isolated from business-space callers.

additions.name: Docusign
additions._endpoint_TODO: verify; Docusign uses OAuth not bearer
additions._oauth_note: Docusign requires OAuth flow — wire via ChittyConnect OAuth broker, not direct bearer

additions.name: Gmail
additions._endpoint_TODO: Gmail MCP is Google-OAuth — route via ChittyConnect Google broker

additions.name: Google Drive
additions._note: evidence-collect skill depends on this — required for case material ingestion

additions.name: Zapier
additions._slim_mcp_note: Zapier exposes 300+ Zaps — mandatory slim-MCP; debatable whether to nest a gateway-in-gateway

additions._comment: ── accounting / books (multitenant — same pattern as Mercury) ──

additions.name: Wave Accounting
additions._endpoint_TODO: Wave's primary API is GraphQL; verify whether they ship native MCP or wrap via ChittyConnect

tenants._doc: One Wave business = one tenant. Mirror Mercury tenants where the same legal entity has both a Mercury bank account and Wave books. tenant_id MUST be a Legal Person ChittyID and SHOULD reconcile with the Mercury tenant of the same ChittyID.

policy._reconcile_note: Reconciliation handled by ChittyFinance (Wave webhook receiver per-business at /api/webhooks/wave/:tenantId/:businessId + Mercury sync via chittycommand) — NOT a separate ChittyBooks service (deprecated 2026-05-27, see CHITTYAPPS/chittybooks#2)

additions._comment: ── ChittyFinance — canonical bookkeeping engine (absorbs former ChittyBooks) ──

additions.name: ChittyFinance
additions._endpoint_note: REST surface today (auth-gated /api/<resource>); MCP endpoint pending — add /mcp when ChittyFinance ships native MCP

tenants._doc: ChittyFinance IS the bookkeeping UI + engine for ChittyOS. Multi-tenant via IT CAN BE LLC entity tree. Tenant set = Mercury orgs + Wave businesses, since Finance ingests both. tenant_id MUST be a Legal Person ChittyID.
tenants._invariant: Finance is the single bookkeeping surface — the former ChittyBooks service was deprecated on 2026-05-27 (CHITTYAPPS/chittybooks#2) after substance audit found both its features (AI categorization + insights) already present in Finance at higher quality

policy._projection_note: Ledger writes flow through the ChittyLedger substrate as the Finance projection; Finance is the engine + UI, ChittyLedger is the immutable substrate

additions._comment: ── ChittyOS-managed CUSTOM (move out of claude.ai personal) ──

_post_merge_checklist: 1. Replace 12 TODO endpoints with verified URLs from upstream docs
2. For OAuth services (Gmail/GCal/GDrive/Docusign): wire ChittyConnect OAuth broker per ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md sensitive-intent contract — do not store long-lived tokens

3. Mercury / Wave / ChittyFinance: fill TODO-chittyid-* placeholders with real Legal Person ChittyIDs from registry; add 1Password vault items mercury-{tenant}, wave-{tenant} for each. Wave also needs wave_business_id from Wave dashboard. ChittyFinance tenants reconcile 1:1 with Mercury+Wave tenants of the same chittyId (Finance is the canonical bookkeeping engine; former ChittyBooks deprecated 2026-05-27).
4. After merge: deploy ch1tty worker, verify each new endpoint via curl mcp.ch1tty.com/health

5. Once ch1tty serves them: delete the 13 duplicates from claude.ai Personal Connectors UI (CloudflareMCP, NEON, Notion, Context7, GitHub, Ahrefs, Mercury, Postman, Docusign, Gmail, GCal, GDrive, Zapier, Twilio, Quo, Mermaid, Chitty Msg, OpenAI Dev Docs)
6. Register slim_mcp:true entries in orchestrator skill:index so search/execute path works (Ahrefs, Postman, Zapier; Notion/Mercury already candidates)
